action_content:

shifted_dn = df['RI'] < med / 5
df.loc[shifted_up, 'RI'] = df.loc[shifted_up, 'RI'] / 10
df.loc[shifted_dn, 'RI'] = df.loc[shifted_dn, 'RI'] * 10
